steps.title: Spot the defining clue
steps.content: The oyster larvae that heard healthy reef sounds were twice as likely as other groups to show signs of making a permanent home. This behavioral difference reveals what characteristic these larvae possessed.

steps.title: Match the word to their reaction
steps.content:
Responsive directly captures what these oyster larvae demonstrated: a strong reaction to environmental cues.

The other choices fail: inactive contradicts their strong reaction, liked doesn't describe environmental stimulus-response, and distressed contradicts the positive outcome.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
